LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT SALVADOR CASTILLO'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. ALTHOUGH THE MOTION IS UNOPPOSED, MOVING PARTY DID NOT ATTACH A COPY OF A PROPOSED ANSWER OR OTHER RESPONSIVE PLEADING, AS REQUIRED BY CCP SEC. 473(B). ("APPLICATION FOR THIS RELIEF SHALL BE ACCOMPANIED BY A COPY OF THE ANSWER OR OTHER PLEADING PROPOSED TO BE FILED THEREIN, OTHERWISE, THE APPLICATION SHALL NOT BE GRANTED.") ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT ; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Apr-03-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Salvador Castillo, 415.525.1617, defendant in propria persona; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT SALVADOR CASTILLO'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is granted. No opposition filed. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR5976

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-18-2014 Continued To Apr-16-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Feb-24-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - CHRIS NORRIS, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
SALVADOR CASTILLO, TEL. NO. (650) 200-0923, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT SALVADOR CASTILLO'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT is Denied without prejudice. Although the motion is unopposed, moving party did not attach a copy of a proposed answer or other responsive pleading, as required by CCP sec. 473(b). ("Application for this relief shall be accompanied by a copy of the answer or other pleading proposed to be filed therein, otherwise, the application shall not be granted.") ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/EHG

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Jan-16-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: SALVADOR CASTILLO, DEFENDANT IN PROPRIA PERSONA; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT SALVADOR CASTILLO'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is off calendar. The moving party failed to provide a proof of service. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Tony Vaughn, CSR #6185
